hint.one_click: One click — we'll create the profile automatically. No emails or passwords needed.
hint.first_time: First time? Just hit Yandex or Telegram — we'll create the profile automatically.
hint.yandex_not_configured: Yandex login is not configured (VITE_YANDEX_CLIENT_ID missing).
hint.dev_no_passwords: No passwords. Creates / re-logs in a user by name. Local only — 404 in prod.

telegram_modal.title: Confirm Telegram sign-in
telegram_modal.description: We opened the bot in a new tab. If that didn't happen, tap "Open Telegram" below. Once the bot replies "Done", you'll land back here automatically.

error.session_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
